data.name: Update700Desc1
data.value: Explore your Rust server like never before with our fully interactive 3D Maps! Includes live player positions and death markers to help you strategize and locate loot.

data.name: Delete3DMapDataTooltip
data.value: Deletes all parsed local map geometries used by the 3D Map Viewer.

data.name: Update700Desc3
data.value: Planning a new base? Use the new Footprint Builder in the 3D map to preview exactly how your base will fit. Test if it fits between No-Build Zones, check slope steepness, or verify water depth before you build in-game.

data.name: Update700Desc2
data.value: We now automatically read your local .map files (safely, as read-only) to extract precise in-game details. This brings exact Building Blocked Zones, Caves, Icebergs, and more directly to both your 3D and 2D maps! And don't worry, the 3D map unloads completely from RAM when closed to save resources.
